title: Mission to the Arc Hammer

{{Quote|I must be out of my mind. The Empire knows I hijacked the ''Executor'' and knows that I'm in this cargo container on my way to the ''Arc Hammer''. It's just me against a waiting army that knows exactly where I am and what I want to do. Is this fun or what?|Kyle Katarn|<ref name="Dark Forces Official Player's Guide">''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]''</ref>}}
The '''Mission to the ''Arc Hammer''''' was an event during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] in which the [[Dark Trooper Project]] was shut down by [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Kyle Katarn]].

==Prelude==
After [[Tak Base]] was destroyed in moments by the [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark troopers]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] next-generation super-troopers, [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] hired Kyle Katarn to take action.<ref name="Dark Forces" />

He gathered clues throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as to what the troopers were, and how to stop them. After stealing a [[nava card]] from [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] and learning the ''[[Arc Hammer]]''{{'s}} location, Katarn ventured to the Imperial [[Fuel Station Ergo/Legends|Fuel Station Ergo]], through which he boarded the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], and then the ''Hammer''.<ref name="Dark Forces" />

==The mission==
===Setting the charges===
Katarn boarded the ''Arc Hammer'' through an automated cargo container. From the cargo bay, he ripped through the inner defenses. His objective was to plant three [[sequencer charge]]s in 3 exhaust ports to destroy the ship and escape in a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]]. He made his way through the inner mazes of the factory ship and planted the three charges. Kyle cleared the hangar bay of [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark troopers]] and opened the shuttle hangar bay door.<ref name="Dark Forces" />

He was greeted by an enormous dark mechanical figure.<ref name="Dark Forces" />

===The final battle===
{{Quote|It's been a long time since I've challenged a man to battle. I'm glad my opponent is so worthy.|General Mohc reveals the ultimate phase of his project in his showdown with Katarn|audio=GladMyOpponentIsWorthy-DF.flac|<ref name="Dark Forces" />}}
General [[Rom Mohc]], creator of the dark troopers, confronted Katarn in his [[Phase III Dark Trooper|Phase III dark trooper]] exosuit, the greatest of the super-trooper phases; 1 of only 3 built. The two clashed in the hangar bays, both sustaining critical wounds.<ref name="Dark Forces" />

In a last desperate attempt to penetrate the armor of the exosuit, Katarn fired volleys of beams and mortars into the thick armor. Mohc's powersuit malfunctioned and exploded, leaving his body in pieces.<ref name="Dark Forces" />

The genius behind the dark trooper project was bested in battle.<ref name="Dark Forces" />

===The escape===
{{Quote|This is an unfortunate setback. The Force is strong with Katarn.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], on the destruction of the ''Arc Hammer''|<ref name="Dark Forces" />}}
With Mohc dead, Kyle found his way to the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] and hijacked an evacuation [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] and fled the burning ship.<ref name="Dark Forces" />

The ship's launch bays exploded, igniting the gas tanks and engulfing the entire ship in flames. Kyle had successfully shut down the dark trooper project.<ref name="Dark Forces" />

[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who witnessed the mercenary's escape from a distance, was the first who recognized the presence of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] within Katarn.<ref name="Dark Forces" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|In light of the ''Arc Hammer'' fiasco, Emperor Palpatine is withdrawing all funding for the development of Imperial battle droids. I ''told'' you it would never work.|[[Grand Vizier/Legends|Grand Vizier]] [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] in a communique to the [[Imperial Department of Military Research/Legends|Imperial Department of Military Research]]|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>}}
Mon Mothma awarded Katarn the [[Star of Alderaan/Legends|Star of Alderaan]] for his bravery and support for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="Dark Forces" />

Still furious over the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|loss]] of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] was so infuriated with the loss of the ''Arc Hammer'' that he ceased all funding for the dark troopers. Though much of the dark trooper project was shut down, some less-powerful dark troopers remained in operation throughout the rest of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Dark Forces" />

The [[TIE Experimental Project]] as well as the [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|TIE/ph phantom]] project were the Empire's next response to the Rebellion.
